description: Dependencies in core are part of the AETERNUS NEXUS runtime, not optional extensions. Packaged builds must bundle them locally and verify imports before startup.

core.purpose: external LLM provider when online policy allows it
embeddings, neural memory and numeric runtime
native enterprise knowledge graph capability; packaged as core, never loaded as a user extension

connectors.purpose: external billing connector; never required for offline boot
external marketing connector; never required for offline boot
large local embedding model; bundled model weights are handled separately

security_requirements: No core dependency may be downloaded on first boot in offline mode.
Packaged apps must include wheelhouse/vendor artifacts with recorded hashes and licenses.
Vendored open-source code must live under a project namespace, for example aeternus_vendor/<name>, never as an untracked copy.
Patched vendored code must include upstream version, source URL, license, checksum and local patch note.
Network-capable connectors are policy-gated and may not be treated as core boot dependencies.
Memory systems are native AETERNUS runtime components. Vector, graph, SQL, episodic and procedural memory must be packaged and visible without third-party extension installation.
